name: io.github.Continuum-AI-Corp/orcarouter-mcp
title: OrcaRouter
description: Browse 160+ LLM models and live pricing — no API key needed for catalog. Add key to route chat.

environmentVariables.name: ORCAROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OrcaRouter API key. Required only for orcarouter_chat. Catalog tools (orcarouter_models_list, orcarouter_model_card, orcarouter_providers_list) work without it.

environmentVariables.name: ORCAROUTER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the gateway base URL. Defaults to https://api.orcarouter.ai.

environmentVariables.name: ORCAROUTER_REQUEST_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 300 (5 minutes) to accommodate long reasoning-model completions.
